result.recit:
## Case Opening — Méridian Studios v. Cassiopée/Julien Mercier (Tohu-Bohu)

---

### 📍 Current Status

**Offensive posture, time-critical.** Score 57/100, distance to target: 26 points. 7 of 9 blocks advanced — but no procedural act filed. We are at **D-38 from the […] irreversible**: the five-year statute of limitations on the infringement claim falls on **August 3, 2026** (L. 335-1 CPI / art. 2224 C. civ.). Everything else is subordinate to that deadline.

---

### ⚡ LEVER: ADMISSIBILITY (7.2 — weakest dimension)

This is where Cassiopée will strike in […], on two cumulative grounds:

1. **Méridian Studios' standing to sue** — the email […] → Méridian Studios dated 09/01/2019 does not satisfy L. 131-3 CPI (no specification of rights assigned, duration, or territory). Cassiopée will invoke Cass. civ. 1, 22 mars 2012 to obtain a ruling of inadmissibility. If Méridian Studios fails to regularize the chain of title or to establish that it is itself the author (collective work/work for hire), the action may be dismissed at the case-management hearing.

2. **Attribution of Cassiopée/Julien Mercier to Tohu-Bohu** — no certified screenshot of the legal notices for the Carto Royale 2/[…] Play application appears in the file. Cassiopée and Julien Mercier may deny any connection to Tohu-Bohu, and the bailiff's report of 10/02/2019 (Exhibit 18.6) does not identify them as publishers. This is a gaping vulnerability.

Both vulnerabilities must be closed **before** or **through** the saisie-contrefaçon (infringement seizure).

---

### 🎯 The Next Highest-Value Move: The Saisie-Contrefaçon

This is move no. 1, and here is why it takes priority over everything else:

- It is the **only act […] that simultaneously closes three fragile blocks**: attribution (certified legal notices of Tohu-Bohu), material facts of the infringement (Bastille/Tohu-Bohu comparative table missing), and dated/lawfully obtained evidence (supplemental report on the application).
- It **interrupts the statute of limitations** within the meaning of L. 332-4 CPI and beats the […] of August 3.
- It provides access to **Tohu-Bohu's technical and commercial data** (advertising revenue, […] database, number of users) that nothing else can yield before the assignation (summons).
- The assignation on the merits must follow within 31 calendar days (L. 332-4), i.e., no later than **July 31, 2026** — that […] is within the window.

**Nullity risk to be neutralized as of Antoine Roux 3 of the petition:** Cassiopée already has two ready-to-deploy decisions — Adverse Exhibit 11 (TGI Paris, April 4, 2014: nullity for failure to serve a separate service document) and Adverse Exhibit 18 (CA Aix-en-Provence, September 15, 2016: nullity due to unauthorized presence of the petitioner). The counter-measure is straightforward but must be scrupulously observed: only the court-appointed technical expert named in the order, a service document separate from the minutes of seizure delivered to the party subject to seizure before operations commence, no representative of Méridian Studios on the premises, statements taken only after infringing elements have been identified.

---

### 🔄 What […] Has Moved Recently

The […] of 06/26 records a massive LLM refresh and ten blocks advanced simultaneously — this is an analytical update, not a procedural act. **Nothing has moved on the procedural side.** We are at D-38 from the […] with no infringement seizure and no assignation served. The clock is running.

---

### 🔍 What Needs to Be Examined — Angles Not Yet Explored

**1. The analytical originality memorandum: pivot block not yet produced (payoff 6, fragile status)**
Méridian Studios itself invoked the "common current" in the matter Cassiopée c. Méridian Studios (TJ Paris, 18/12/2020, Exhibit 12). Cassiopée will turn that judicial admission against Méridian Studios to demonstrate the absence of originality in Bastille. Without an analytical inventory of the creative choices […] — phrasing of challenges, category architecture, graphic approach, novel combination of mechanics — the […] will be dismissed for lack of proof, as in the adverse precedent. This memorandum must be produced before the assignation, ideally drafted with or by the creator of Bastille.

**2. The chain of title: the email […] is insufficient**
L. 131-3 is unforgiving. Without a regularized assignment instrument specifying the rights assigned, the duration, and the territory, or without establishing that Méridian Studios is itself the author (collective work or work for hire), Cassiopée may obtain a ruling of inadmissibility. This is the adverse move with low payoff (3) but potentially devastating effect on the entire action. To be regularized urgently — an amendment or a confirmatory assignment in […] and proper form is sufficient if […] is still reachable.

**3. The trademark infringement theory: safety net not yet analyzed**
Trademark Méridian Studios no. 4449595 is registered. If Tohu-Bohu reproduces distinctive elements covered by that mark, a trademark ground can double the copyright action and secure admissibility if the copyright chain of title falters. This candidate theory has not yet been analyzed — it is an angle to […] urgently, precisely because admissibility is the adverse lever.

**4. The symmetric evidentiary contradiction: underestimated risk**
Adverse Exhibit 24 (list of Bastille updates) is produced without a certified date or qualified timestamp — that […] is a strong argument against Cassiopée. But Exhibit 4 Bis (screenshot of December 7, 2018) on Méridian Studios' side is in the same position. If the court applies symmetry, it will exclude both. Our own exhibits must be certified in […]: qualified eIDAS timestamp or retroactive bailiff's report on Exhibit 4 Bis, before Cassiopée raises the argument.

**5. The damages quantum: the xlsx file is not usable**
The "Damages" block is fragile. The certified public accountant's attestation […] establishes sales variations but does not demonstrate the causal link with Tohu-Bohu. The file "Manque A Gagner Méridian Studios.xlsx" has not been extracted or certified. Cassiopée will rely on Adverse Exhibit 25 (Cass. com., 9 juin 2021) and Adverse Exhibit 27 (CA Paris, […] c. Tripotoly) to challenge the quantum. This block must be consolidated by a detailed, comprehensive expert accountant's report before the […] merits briefs.

---

### ✅ The 4 Moves to Trigger — In This Order

| # | Action | Why Now |
|---|--------|---------|
| 🚨 1 | **Petition for saisie-contrefaçon (infringement seizure) before the TJ** | Interrupts the statute of limitations, closes attribution + material facts + evidence, beats the […] of August 3 |
| 📋 2 | **Produce the analytical originality memorandum** | Pivot block fragile, TJ 2020 precedent to neutralize, […] before the assignation |
| 🔍 3 | **Analyze the trademark infringement block** | Safety net if the L. 131-3 chain of title falters — candidate theory not yet […] |
| ⚔️ 4 | **Red-team on standing (L. 131-3)** | Identify the precise counter-measure (regularization of assignment […] or establishment of collective work) before the assignation is served |

suggestions.label: 🚨 File the application for saisie-contrefaçon (infringement seizure) (D-38 […])
suggestions.reason: The sole procedural act […] that tolls the statute of limitations, provides access to Tohu-Bohu's data (attribution + underlying facts), and pre-empts the […] of August 3. To be drafted with care: independent expert only, separate service of process, no Méridian Studios representative — in order to neutralize opposing Exhibits 11 and 18.

suggestions.label: 📋 Produce the analytical brief on the originality of Bastille
suggestions.reason: Fragile pivot block (payoff 6): absent an inventory of the creative choices […] (formulation of the challenges, architecture, style guide), Cassiopée will exploit the precedent of TJ Paris 2020 (Exhibit 12) and the admission of 'common current.' To be produced prior to the assignation (summons).

suggestions.label: 🔍 Analyze the trademark infringement block (candidate theory)
suggestions.reason: Mark no. 4449595 may secure standing/admissibility if the copyright chain of title falters on article L.131-3. Candidate theory not yet analyzed — to be […] on an urgent basis as a fallback safety net.

suggestions.label: ⚔️ Red-team: opposing party's attack on standing (article L.131-3)
suggestions.reason: Most dangerous vulnerability: Cassiopée may obtain a ruling of inadmissibility if the assignment […] is not regularized. The red-team exercise identifies the precise counter-measure (formal deed of assignment or demonstration of a collective work) before the assignation (summons) is served.
